basic_details.job_title: SFIO Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 69 Junior Consultants and Young Professionals Posts
basic_details.short_information: Serious Fraud Investigation Office (SFIO) has released the official Junior Consultants and Young Professionals Notification 2026 at sfio.nic.in. A total of 69 vacancies have been announced under the SFIO Junior Consultants and Young Professionals Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between Max: 65 years with a qualification of Law Graduate, Advocate, CA/ICWA/MBA (Finance), PhD/Master's Degree or MBA in relevant fields can apply online from 13 May 2026 to 03 June 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.age_details: Maximum age of 65 years for retired government employees.
age_limit.details: Maximum age of 65 years for retired government employees with grade pay of Rs.7600 (Pay Matrix-12) and above and with at least 10 years' experience in the required domain.

qualification.education_qualification: Law Graduate, Advocate, CA/ICWA/MBA (Finance), PhD/Master's Degree or MBA in relevant field.
qualification.details: Junior Consultant (Law): Advocate with at least 3-8 years' experience, preferably having exposure in other investigation agencies and/or regulatory bodies in the field of Corporate Law. Young Professional (Law): Law Graduate with at least one-year experience, preferably having exposure in other investigation agencies and/or regulatory bodies in the field of Corporate Law. Junior Consultant (Financial Analysis): CA/CWA/MBA(Finance) with at least 3-8 years' experience, preferably having exposure in other investigation agencies and/or regulatory bodies in the field of Financial Analysis/Forensic Audit. Young Professional (Financial Analysis/Forensic Audit): CA/ICWA/MBA (Finance) with at least one-year experience, preferably having exposure in other investigation agencies and/or regulatory bodies. Junior Consultant (General Administration): PhD/Master's Degree or MBA in relevant field/subject with 3-8 years' experience.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of SFIO to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
